sectiondef.header: Reset and Address Filter (RAF) Register bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XAE_RAF_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Transmit Inter-Frame Gap Adjustment Register (TFGP) bit definitions
Other Constant definitions used in the driver

briefdescription.para: Number of loops in the driver API to wait for before returning a failure case.
Timeout in ticks used while checking if the core had come out of reset.

detaileddescription.para: The exact tick time is defined in each case/loop where it will be used

memberdef.name: XXxvEthernet_reg_name
memberdef.initializer: (((RegOffset) == XXE_GRR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_GRR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_RST_OFFSET) ? "XXE_RST_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_MODE_OFFSET) ? "XXE_MODE_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_TXCFG_OFFSET) ? "XXE_TXCFG_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_RXCFG_OFFSET) ? "XXE_RXCFG_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_RXMTU_OFFSET) ? "XXE_RXMTU_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_TICK_OFFSET) ? "XXE_TICK_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_REV_OFFSET) ? "XXE_REV_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_TXSR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_TXSR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_RXSR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_RXSR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_SR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_SR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_RXBLSR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_RXBLSR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_ANSR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_ANSR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_ANASR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_ANASR_OFFSET": \ "unknown")

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_ReadReg returns the value read from the register specified by RegOffset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Xxv Ethernet device.
is the offset of the register to be read.

simplesect.para: Returns the 32-bit value of the register.
C-style signature: u32 XXxvEthernet_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_WriteReg, writes Data to the register specified by RegOffset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Xxv Ethernet device.
is the offset of the register to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XXxvEthernet_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)
